title: PG-003: Postgres CI — Pg test tagging, glob patterns, and integration test
consumer_purpose: Ensure all Drizzle queries execute against Postgres via tagged Pg test files and a CI workflow with Postgres service container
claim_atoms: CI pg job runs all *.pg.test.ts via glob
new pg-integration test covers Pg adapter+project+workspace+sync
all Pg tests pass against both PGlite and real Postgres
content:
## PG-003: Postgres CI — Pg test tagging, glob patterns, and integration test

### Current State
PG-002 created:
- CI `pg` job with Postgres 16 service container
- `test/fixture/pg.ts` (pgTestLayer with PGlite/real-Pg switching)
- `test/storage/adapter.pg.test.ts` (Pg adapter tests)
- `test/storage/migration.pg.test.ts` (Pg migration tests)
- `package.json` `test:pg` script with hardcoded file list

### Changes

#### 1. Update `test:pg` script in package.json
- Change from explicit file list to glob: `test/**/*.pg.test.ts`

#### 2. Update CI `.github/workflows/test.yml`
- Change `pg` job's run step from explicit file list to glob: `test/**/*.pg.test.ts`
- This ensures any new `*.pg.test.ts` files auto-discover

#### 3. Create `test/storage/pg-integration.test.ts`
A comprehensive Pg integration test that exercises:
- Drizzle query execution (select, insert, update, delete)
- Transactions (commit, rollback, retry)
- afterCommit hooks
- Schema isolation (via pgTestLayer)
- Runs against PGlite locally, real Postgres in CI

#### 4. Verify tests pass
Run `bun test test/**/*.pg.test.ts` locally, fix any failures

### Files changed
- `packages/opencode/package.json` — test:pg script
- `.github/workflows/test.yml` — pg job test command
- `packages/opencode/test/storage/pg-integration.test.ts` — new file
